title: tithymalus triflorus subsp. kerneri
intro: Tithymalus triflorus subsp. kerneri, also known as Euphorbia kerneri, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its unique appearance and medicinal properties. The plant contains euphorbin, a toxic compound with medicinal properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. Its health benefits include treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant is typically prepared as an ointment, salve, or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to alleviate a range of health problems.
